title: Donut Stash
description: Spawn fake stash to catch xray & esp hackers
body:
![Stash spawn](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a07a924f0d95ea9ae6599ca88326671f3555f5f_0.webp)
# Issues & Suggestions

Visit our [Discord](https://discord.gg/simplestudio) for any issues or suggestions!

# Summary
Donut Stash is a way for staff to catch xray and esp hackers by spawning in a fake stash near players to see if they start to dig towards it or not.

# Features
- Spawn Fake Stash Via /stash spawn
- Add your own stashes via schematics
- Fawe Hook for blazing fast stash pasting

# Commands
- /stash spawn
- /stash reload


# Permissions:
- stash.admin - Access to /stash spawn and /stash reload

# Config:

```

# STASH PLUGIN
# AUTHOR: JAMPLIFIER
# SUPPORT: https://discord.gg/simplestudio

SCHEMATIC-NAME: stash.schem

PASTE:
  DISTANCE-INFRONT: 6
  PASTE-AIR: true
  RANDOM-ROTATION: true

MESSAGES:
  STASH-SPAWNED: "&aSpawned stash."
  STASH-RELOADED: "&aReloaded config."
  NO-SCHEMATIC: "&cCould not find schematic."

```
